name: Chile Chicken Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Poach the chicken in water or stock until cooked through.
2. Let the chicken cool enough to handle, then remove the meat from bones and discard skin and bones.
3. Process all ingredients except the chicken together.
4. Add the chicken in chunks and process again to achieve a chunky texture.
5. Serve with tomato and a slice of purple (red) onion.
